<Meta title="Hooks/use___HookName___" />

# use___HookName___

One line describing what `use___HookName___` does.

```ts
const [value, setValue] = use___HookName___(initialValue);
```

- **`initialValue`** (`number`, default `0`) — the starting value.
- **Returns** a readonly `[value, setValue]` tuple.

## Live demo

export const Demo = () => {
	const [value, setValue] = use___HookName___(0);
	return <Button text={`Value: ${value}`} onClick={() => setValue(value + 1)} />;
};

<Demo />
